entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA 2022 Application and HANA DB supported o...
entry.content:
For the HANA Database, please see

2235581 - SAP HANA: Supported Operating Systems
https://me.sap.com/notes/2235581/E

"
9.2 (HANA 2.0 SPS05 revision 59.09, HANA 2.0 SPS06 revision 67.02 and HANA 2.0 SPS07 revision 72 and newer)
"
so your OS of 9.2 is support on HANA 2 SPS7 rev 72

For the S/4HANA information see
3397243 - SAP S/4HANA 2022 - Release & Information Note
https://me.sap.com/notes/3397243/E

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA
entry.content:
Qq on the https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/apis/resource-changes-for-tasks-defects-requirements and how the API used for integrating with Jira functions.

If we were to push a Requirement from SAP Cloud ALM, at which level would it map in Jira? At the Epics level? Or at the Story or Sub-Task level? If not, would they need to maintain specific mappings to point a Requirement from Cloud ALM to an Epic in Jira?

entry.title: Purpose of customer and vendor linked to storage location and requirement
entry.content:
Hi Im fairly new to MM world and just trying to understand the purpose of customer and vendor in table T001L and its requirement. Secondly we currently have a customer vendor already pointing to plant storage location as shown below and is representing a third party location and address

Plant     StrLoc         Vendor          Customer
ABCD    1                 123               456

If we now have another plant and storage lcoation that is representing same third party location and address can we just reuse the vendor customer as shown below?

Plant     StrLoc         Vendor          Customer
EFGH    1                 123               456

entry.title: Re: Manage Allocation Rules in SAC

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content: I tried a smaller prompt and still got the same error.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 

Thanks for sharing the code. I have changed the warpper's ui5.yaml as below and it's working.

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: taskuiwrapper
type: application
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: false
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
        backend:
          - path: /bpa_role_assignment_ui.bparoleassignmentuiworkflowuimodule/api/public/workflow/rest/v1
            pathPrefix: /public/workflow/rest/v1
            url: https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com
            destination: bpa_workflowruntime                      
    - name: fiori-tools-appreload
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        port: 35729
        path: webapp
        delay: 300
    - name: fiori-tools-preview
      afterMiddleware: fiori-tools-appreload
      configuration:
        component: taskuiwrapper
        ui5Theme: sap_horizon
    - name: fiori-tools-servestatic
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        paths:
          - path: /resources/bparoleassignmentui/workflowuimodule
            src: ../workflow-ui-module/webapp
          - path: /appconfig
            src: appconfig

entry.title: Re: Data Load to SAC for SuccessFactor for FTE Planning
entry.content:
hi @N1kh1l ,

Using job classification I unfortunately didn't get the required data fields like position details , employee Details , employment details etc . 

1. My question is if we cannot get all this data via one query , Would we have to  do separate queries ? 

2. If we do make separate queries how do we do it ? I tried to do this and while I mapped the fields it seems that the ID fields needs to be mapped again ( map to facts ) ( I may or may not get all the ID fields with each set of queries ) example when I do a query on position , I do not have employee details and my dimensions go unmapped and data overwritten . 

Can you help sort this ? Please?

entry.title: Transgender Day Of Visibility - March 31st 2024
entry.content:
At Pride@SAP we understand the importance of our acronym – LGBTQIA+ and how every part of our community should have the same sense of belonging.  

 

March 31st marks Transgender Day of Visibility. While there are holidays commemorating transgender people who have suffered, International Transgender Day of Visibility focuses on more of the positive aspects of what being transgender means and takes direct action in changing the biases of people who don’t understand transgender.  

 

At Pride@SAP, we are often asked “how can I be a better ally”, and there are many answers to this, but always remember, the “right” things to do or say because often there is no one “right” answer to every situation you might encounter. I have spoken at SAP before about how Allyship should be seen as progress and not perfection – we are going to get it wrong and that’s ok, but when we commit to self-education and take steps to challenge anti-transgender remarks or jokes in public spaces, including LGBTQIA+ spaces, these actions will help change the culture, making society a better, safer place for transgender people and for all people (trans or not) who do not conform to conventional gender expectations. 

Here are some tips provided by the organization GLAAD.

 

* (https://glaad.org/transgender/allies, Updated March 2021 / Adapted from MIT’s “Action Tips for Allies of Trans People.”) 

 

 

If you don’t know what pronouns to use, listen first. 
If you’re unsure which pronoun a person uses, listen first to the pronouns other people use when referring to them. Someone who knows the person well will probably use the correct pronoun. If you must ask which pronoun the person uses, start with your own. For example, “Hi, I’m Alex and I use the pronouns he and him. What about you?” Then use that person’s pronoun and encourage others to do so. If you accidently use the wrong pronoun, apologize quickly and sincerely, correct your mistake, then move on. The bigger deal you make out of the situation, the more uncomfortable it is for everyone. 

 

Understand there is no “right” or “wrong” way to transition, and that it is different for every person. 
Some transgender people access medical care like hormone replacement therapy and surgeries as part of their transition in order to align their bodies with their gender identity. Some transgender people want their authentic gender identity to be recognized without hormones or surgery. Some transgender people cannot access gender affirming healthcare due to a lack of financial resources or access to trained providers. A transgender person’s gender is not dependent on medical procedures or how they look. Accept that if someone tells you they are transgender, they are. 

 

Challenge anti-transgender remarks or jokes in public spaces, including LGB spaces. 
You may hear anti-transgender comments from anti-LGBTQ activists, but you may also hear them from LGB people. Someone may think that because they’re gay, it’s ok for them to use certain words or tell jokes about transgender people. It’s important to challenge anti-transgender remarks or jokes whenever they are said and no matter who says them. 

 

Understand the differences between “coming out” as lesbian, gay, or bisexual and “coming out” as transgender. 
“Coming out” to other people as lesbian, gay, or bisexual is typically seen as revealing a truth that allows other people to know your authentic self. The LGB community places great importance and value on the idea of being “out” in order to be happy and whole. When a transgender person has transitioned and is living their life as their authentic self–that is their truth. The world now sees them as who they truly are. Unfortunately, it can often feel disempowering for a transgender person to disclose to other people that they are transgender. Sometimes when other people learn a person is trans, they no longer see the person as “real.” Some people may choose to publicly discuss their gender history in an effort to raise awareness and make cultural change, but please don’t assume that it’s necessary for a transgender person to disclose that they are transgender in order to feel happy and whole. 

 

Know your own limits as an ally. 
Don’t be afraid to admit when you don’t know something. It is better to admit you don’t know something than to make assumptions or say something that may be incorrect or hurtful. Seek out the appropriate resources that will help you learn more. Remember being an ally is a sustained and persistent pattern of action, not an idle or stable noun.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content: @MioYasuatke Please discard my previous message. Thank you so much for helping me out.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 

I see the same errors in the network tab, but the app is loaded.

The $metadata request (which is failing) is sent because it is defined in the manifest.json of your task UI app. Removing the sections below will suppress the request.

        "dataSources": {
            "mainService": {
                "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/",
                "type": "OData",
                "settings": {
                    "annotations": [],
                    "localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
                    "odataVersion": "2.0"
                }
            }
        }
...
        "models": {
            ...
            "": {
                "dataSource": "mainService",
                "preload": true,
                "settings": {}
            }
        },

entry.title: Re: Where Did The Web Intelligence Content Go?
entry.content:
Hello nschaeffer,

This issue was already alerted in this post:
https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/bug-blog-shows-up-under-untagged-tag/qaq-p...

Please follow that post, as we will be providing updates there.

Regards,
Audrey

entry.title: How to check reports for Variance?
entry.content:
We would like to view a report with Event-based production variances. Which apps can we use?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check reports for Variance?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to view event-based production variances in company code currency, group currency and freely defined currencies in parallel ledgers, you can use the following apps:

  • Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based

  • Order Cost Details - Event-Based

  • Product Profitability with Production Variances


You can also refer to the below SAP Help Portal Documentation:

Event-Based Variance Posting


Best Regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Announcing General Availability of SAP Build Code: Speed up development with generative AI
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for sharing!

Is it/will it be possible to generate ABAP Cloud code with Joule in SAP Build code?

entry.title: Re: Notes on installing SAPGUI for Java for macOS
entry.content:
Hi,

I suppose the question about whether some feature is available in SAPGUI for Java or not, can only be answered by SAP themselves, as the non-SAP employees (such as me) have zero visibility into what will or won't be offered in the next releases.

If there is a feature such as an editor that works in SAPGUI for Windows, then whether or not it can be made available for SAPGUI for Java, Iikely depends on whether the functionality can be implemented in Java or whether there are dependencies on Windows OS specific libraries and such like, and what kind of effort would be required to make a Java implementation, and how important the feature parity is viewed by SAP via their assessment of user demand, etcetera. Again though, only SAP themselves are likely to have any insight into the answers...

entry.title: Re: HMAC-SHA1 hash verification on API Management
entry.content: Any reason why I get header parameter blank??

entry.title: Re: How to debug Fiori My Leave Request authorisation issues
entry.content:
The solution to this authorisation issue was in the email address of the particular user.  Email address is used in the authentication.    The email address of the impacted employees was a mixture of upper and lower case.

Once the email address was changed to all lower case, the access issue was resolved.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: Object Page Custom Section containing Geomap (OData V4 and V2)
entry.content: Thanks a lot, this is the blog I am looking for.

entry.title: Seeking to understand the various table relationships for S/4 HANA Business Partner
entry.content:
Hello

We have gone live with S/4 HANA a few months ago and I am trying to get a grasp on 'Business Partner' and the relationship to the various tables that have a dependency.    As an example there are various Address tables that get populated for a particular Business Partner / Address number - ADRP, ADR6, ADRC, ADCP. 

I'm particularly interested to understand how table MOM052 gets populated - and is it possible to remove any errant entries from this table.

Can anyone suggest any documentation or blogs on this topic?

Regards

Pat

entry.title: 30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects: Starts on April 1st
entry.content:
30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects: Starts on April 1st



At our 2024 NextGen SAP Enterprise Architect Forum, held at SAP's North American Headquarters in Newtown Square, PA  from Feb 26 – 29th, I said that I did not want content from our event to “live and die at the event” and for our conversations and programming to continue.

We have curated insights and content from this event in the form of presentations, recorded videos, blogs, “nuggets of next” and additional resources to share with Enterprise Architects globally across the SAP Ecosystem.

Blog Posting Schedule: 

March 30 - Pregame Show: Insider Views & Insights on the Next Generation SAP EA Forum 2024

March 31 - Kicking Off SAP Enterprise Architects 2024 Forum: A Journey of Growth and Community

April 1 - The Future Does Not Fit in the Containers of the Past

April 2 - Better. Transform. Together. Accelerating Business Transformation with EA

April 3 - Turning Strategy Into Reality With Business Architecture

April 4 - Enterprise Architects Facing the Cloud and AI Frontier

April 5 - The Enterprise Architect’s Blueprint for SAP S/4HANA Success

April 6 - Discover SAP BTP’s Strategy and Roadmap Highlights

April 7 - Unpacking the Transformation Suite Approach and Toolchain

April 8 - Simplifying your Data Readiness and Migration for SAP S/4HANA, Cloud & AI

April 9 - SAP Signavio: Next Generation Business Process Management

April 10 - Essential Toolset for Planning & Migrating to SAP S/4HANA

April 11 - Adopting a Corporate Explorers Mindset - Enterprise Architects as Corporate Explorers

April 12 - Captain Proton’s Guide to GenAI 4th Dimension

April 13 - The Heterogeneous, Composable, Autonomous Enterprise

April 14 - The Role of Enterprise Architecture to Manage SAP's Transformation into the Cloud

April 15 - Filling the Holes in your S/4 Business Case

April 16 - Discover how Tricentis is fortifying SAP S/4HANA Transformations

April 17 - Human Skills: The Multidisciplinary Edge for Enterprise Architects

April 18 - From Systems to Ecosystems: The EA Mindset in the Age of AI

April 19 - Clean Core: Mastering a future-proof and agile ERP

April 20 - How EA’s Can Prepare the Next Generation of EA’s – and Themselves

April 21 - Demystifying SAP’s Data & Analytics Solutions

April 22 - Connecting Process and Architecture to Maximize Value

April 23 - Enterprise Architecture and Sustainably - Translating Strategy into Execution

April 24 - Business Architecture: What, Why, and How

April 25 - An Enterprise EAs View on SAP Business Technology Platform

April 26 - A Primer on the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework

April 27 - AI for EAs and Architecting for AI

April 28 - The Enterprise Architect and SAP S/4HANA Transformations

April 29 - Building and Evolving your Enterprise Architecture Practice

April 30 - Wisdom from the Next Generation SAP EA Forum Crowd and What's Next

May 1 – Sharing free eBook "Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum - 2024 Edition” generated with the help of AI of course for the SAP Community Enterprise Architect Group

Looking forward to 30 Days of Sharing and Learning with the SAP Community Enterprise Architecture Group.

You can also follow my LinkedIn posts in April 1st to 30th and hashtags  #SAP #SAPCommunity #SAPEA #NextGenSAPEA #30DaysofEALearning 

Special Thanks for our Sponsors and Supporters

SAP Enterprise Architecture Group Flag Photos

We have a lot of great material that will be sharing from April 1st to April 30th - of course there were are lot and I mean a LOT of SAP Enterprise Architecture Group Flag Photos. Community is all about the People and "People Magic" - we have so much magic happening with connecting, sharing and learning together as a community.

 

 

Source for all images and photos: Paul Kurchina

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content:
Getting the same error.

"Request failed with status code 403"

Below is the Joule output.

{

 "label": "Joule.Joule_Genie",

 "level": "error",

 "message": {

 "message": "Request failed with status code 403",

 "name": "AxiosError",

 "stack": "AxiosError: Request failed with status code 403
	at settle (/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/38__@ext-lcapvsc-npm-vscode__joule@1.26.0-3/extension/out/extension.js:12081:16)
	at IncomingMessage.handleStreamEnd (/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/38__@ext-lcapvsc-npm-vscode__joule@1.26.0-3/extension/out/extension.js:12886:15)
	at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:526:35)
	at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1359:12)
	at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:82:21)",

 "config": {

 "transitional": {

 "silentJSONParsing": true,

 "forcedJSONParsing": true,

 "clarifyTimeoutError": false

 },

 "adapter": [

 "xhr",

 "http"

 ],

 "transformRequest": [

 null

 ],

 "transformResponse": [

 null

 ],

 "timeout": 0,

 "xsrfCookieName": "XSRF-TOKEN",

 "xsrfHeaderName": "X-XSRF-TOKEN",

 "maxContentLength": -1,

 "maxBodyLength": -1,

 "env": {},

 "headers": {

 "Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*",

 "Content-Type": "application/json",

 "AI-Resource-Group": "default",

 "User-Agent": "axios/1.6.0",

 "Accept-Encoding": "gzip, compress, deflate, br"

 },

 "method": "get",

 "url": "https://<replaced my trial account>.us10cf.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/llm/v2/lm/deployments"

 },

 "code": "ERR_BAD_REQUEST",

 "status": 403

 },

 "time": "2024-03-30T00:03:32.474Z"

}

{

 "label": "Joule.Joule_Genie",

 "level": "error",

 "message": {},

 "time": "2024-03-30T00:03:32.476Z"

}

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content:
The 403 error no longer appears when clearing all browser data. 

  • Clear all browser data
  • Log back into your account and navigate to SAP Build Code
  • Now the Joule prompting works and generates the data model code.

entry.title: Re: Two tables in the same section of an Object Page
entry.content:
Hi !

Yes you can do it.
First you need 2 composition view ( no associate )

define root view ZI_COMPONENTES
as select from zTABLE
composition [1..*] of Z_YourCDS1 as _Z_YourCDS1
composition [0..*] of Z_YourCDS2 as _Z_YourCDS2
{
fields,

_Z_YourCDS1,
_Z_YourCDS2
}

after that, in your metada file use normally the #LINEITEM_REFERENCE :

{
id: 'idTarea',
purpose: #STANDARD ,
type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE ,
label: 'Historial de Tareas',
position: 50 ,
targetElement: '_Z_YourCDS1' },

{
id: 'idComponente',
purpose: #STANDARD ,
type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE ,
label: 'Historial de Recomendaciones',
position: 100 ,
targetElement: '_Z_YourCDS2' }

Ready!

Regards!
Andres Diaz.

entry.title: Advance Intercompany sales Purchase order Posting Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,
 
i have a Question here on advance intercompany where my scenario is below.
 
Selling company / sales org / Plant = BMBL
Delivering company/Sales org/ plant = BMGW
 
Scenario created:1
 
So in transit level i have mapped to company code BMDE Selling code - BMDE = BMBL (Plant)
So in transit level i have mapped to company code BMGB Delivering code - BMGB = BMGW (Plant)
 
here my Question when have intercompany scenario needed to be activated for different plant in Company code BMDE & BMGB then you cannot maintain other plants here in config Level V_T001_TRNSTPLNT then how come this functionality can be adopted for other plants in S4 Hana for the company codes mentioned.
 
scenario created: 2
 
Company code Sales or selling plant Delivering plant
BMDE BMBV BMBV DE
BMGB BMHM BMHM GB
 
Transit plant BMBV
 
But my test case shows wrong where it is showing wrong Transit plant which should not be BMBL in scenario 2 but it is coming from Config. V_T001_TRNSTPLNT.
 
But here my Question when we have multiple transit plants in one single company code then how this process can be adopted in advance intercompany process.
 
can you please help some info on  this thank you.

entry.title: Re: mwst condition type
entry.content: Hello @jpfriends079,

entry.title: How to create a approval procedure in job scheduling management?
entry.content:
Introduction:

Job management is a process that supports management of solution-wide background operations that automate your business processes. It allows you to request, document, analyze, and schedule background jobs in your system environment from a central location, with a standardized workflow.

 

How to create approval procedure?

To create an approval procedure for the Job Scheduling Manager in SAP Solution Manager 7.2, you need to follow these steps:

  1. Go to the Solution Manager Configuration work center: In SAP Solution Manager, go to the Solution Manager Configuration work center.
  2. Navigate to the Job Scheduling Manager: In the Solution Manager Configuration work center, navigate to the Job Scheduling Manager.
  3. Create an approval group: In the Job Scheduling Manager, go to the Approval Groups tab and create a new approval group. Specify the name and description of the approval group, and select the users who will be part of the approval group.
  4. Create an approval process: In the Job Scheduling Manager, go to the Approval Processes tab and create a new approval process. Specify the name and description of the approval process, and select the approval group that you created in step 3.
  5. Define the approval criteria: In the Approval Processes tab, define the approval criteria for the approval process. You can specify the criteria based on the job type, frequency, and impact of the job.
  6. Assign the approval process to a job: In the Job Scheduling Manager, go to the Jobs tab and select a job. In the Properties tab, assign the approval process that you created in step 4 to the job.
  7. Activate the approval process: In the Approval Processes tab, activate the approval process.

By following these steps, you will create an approval procedure for the Job Scheduling Manager in SAP Solution Manager 7.2. When a job is scheduled, the approval process will be triggered, and the job will be approved or rejected based on the criteria that you specified in the approval process

entry.title: Re: Specify an active branch
entry.content: Any updates? I get the same error, have you solved the problem?

entry.title: SAP PI Scenario Sender REST Query or Odata
entry.content:
We are migrating SAP Gateway to SAP PI and there is a scenario where it uses OData <-> RFC, this endpoint used now is similar: <url sap gateway>$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2'

For cause of application, we wil have to create a scenario to PI using a request with GET https://host:port/RESTAdapter/apitest$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2' and ... and I see OData Sender channel in PI, but I didn't fiund anything about this subject with, my question: Is it possible to build a similiar endpoint using:

https://host:port/RESTAdapter/apitest$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2' and ...

in SAP PI? Because we want there to be no incompatibility with the application that now consumes OData Gateway, so we want the url to be modified as little as possible.

entry.title: PTAX amount not calculated for month of march for Orissa
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am facing a issue  where PTAX is not getting calculated in the month of March

The projection is calculating for the particular month due which the the amount is below the slab rate.

 

Its taking from april to february and march its is taking seperately

 

Please suggest its very urgent

entry.title: YTD/YTG Calculation on a fiscal year
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Our client follows the fiscal year from October to September and in IBP we have the standard time profile(Jan to Dec). Can someone share any ideas to calculate the YTD/YTG to follow the fiscal year and what changes i need to do to time profile. IBP_CAGGR function is considering from Jan to December.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

BK

entry.title: Oening and closing balance
entry.content:
Hello

I have legal doc with a provision of 420 mil

I calculated the yearly provision successfully

I need to create a data action the will calculate the end period
and calculate the opening balance amount base of last year closing balance

HOW CAN I DO THAT?

entry.title: Re: keep old ABAP versions, ie in Git (?)
entry.content: [wrong comment]

entry.title: Re: keep old ABAP versions, ie in Git (?)
entry.content:
Thanks @Karin for your reply. 

Based on your info (and the gCTS course from a few years ago) I'm thinking along the lines of replaying *all* transports (we have all co/data files of the last 20 years, not sure if gCTS requires that) via Manual Push into one repo (master branch). Every transport corresponds to 1 commit. That will require some custom ABAP automation because of volume. 

Then do some scripting with git, like below, to get a nice linear timeline.

 

git commit --date=<transport release date> --amend

 

So we get a nice customizing and ABAP workbench "archive" of our current Dev system.

Should work right?

[edit]

No, it probably won't. Manual Push process uses Transport of Copies, and afaik a ToC of a very old transport does not respect the versions of objects (or customizing values) of that old transport.

entry.title: concatenate bank Key and bank account in dmee tree sap hana
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have created a DMEE tree to general payment file to the Bank that works fine. However, when I try to concatenate Bank Key and Bank Account fields using atom I am getting errors. does anyone know the right process to accomplish concatenating two element fields. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Disable Valuehelp button for Selection field in fiori...
entry.content:
I suppose you want to restrict the selection field to only take a single value. The following annotation should do it for v4 services. If there is a value help for the data field, it will still be available. But the user can only make one selection. 

 

 

FilterExpressionRestriction.AllowedExpressions = "SingleValue"
       @Consumption.filter.multipleSelections: false 
       @Consumption.filter.selectionType: #SINGLE

 

 

See: UI5 Demo Kit | Configuring Filter Fields 

for v2 use the annotation sap:filter-restriction="single-value".

entry.title: Re: how to add a header message within the tile?
entry.content: Have you tried Setting the Table Header ?

entry.title: Re: How to create a approval procedure in job scheduling management?
entry.content: Moderator alerted to move your post from Q&A Questions about SAP Websites to Technology Blog by Members.

entry.title: Re: How to include document in Task List of Maintenance ?
entry.content:
Hi,

DMS is activated, you can attached through DMS

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Odata adapter error 'WstxUnexpectedCharExcept...
entry.content:
You are seeing this issue because authentication is failing. The server is responding with a page to login. The adapter is failing to parse the html page.

Solution is to fix authentication.

Do you know why I can not see it there? Thanks a lot in advance!


Kind Regards,

Jan

entry.title: Create Half Day Holiday in SuccessFactors Timeoff
entry.content:
However, if you want to set your working schedule for the half day, then it is required to configure the variant. But before we create the Half Day Holiday pattern, please ensure the below permissions (RBP) are assigned to your user ID:  

User Permissions --> Time Management Object Permissions -->

  • Holiday
  • Holiday Category 
  • Holiday Calendar
  • Holiday Assignment
  • Holiday Planned Working Time Determination 
  • Holiday Planned Working Time Determination.Holiday Planned Working Time Specifications (Holiday Planned Working Time Specification) 
  • Work Schedule Day Model Variant Identifier 
  • Work Schedule Day Model.Variant Assignments
  • Work Schedule Day Model
  • Work Schedule Day Model Segment

 

  • Administrator Permissions --> Metadata Framework -->  
    • Configure Object Definition 
    • Manage Data
    • Access to non-secured object

After we have the required permissions and the Time off is enabled now for example, lets follow the below steps to create a Holiday with a name “Drive day”, where the first half is a working day and the second half is a holiday

  1. Admin Center --> Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create New --> Holiday.

 

 

  1. Admin Center --> Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create New --> Holiday Category

 

 

  1. Admin Center --> Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create New --> Work Schedule Day Model Variant Identifier

 

Let's create Work Schedule Day Model Variant Identifier for example, “1HW_2HH (1HW_2HH)”

 

 

 

  1. Admin Center --> Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create New --> Work Schedule Day Model

 

  • Create the work schedule with the working hours for the half day. Ensure Day Model usage as “Variant for Partial Holidays”.
  • To be able to define a particular time for working on the half day, select “Clock Times” for Time Recording variant.

 

 

 

 

 

  1. Admin Center --> Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create New --> Work Schedule Day Model

 

 

 

While creating Work Schedule Day Model in Variant Assignments assign Work Schedule Day Model Variant Identifier created above for example, “1HW_2HH (1HW_2HH)” in the Day Model Variant Identifier and the variant Work Schedule Day Model created above:  1HW_2HH_WDM

 

  1. Admin Center --> Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create New --> Holiday Planned Working Time Determination

 

Assign the Holiday Category and set it is as Reduced Planned working time in the Holiday Planned Working Time

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  1. Admin Center -->Manage Time off Structures (or Manage Data) --> Create --> Holiday Calendar

Assign the Holiday “Drive Day” to your Holiday Calendar and in the details for the date of the Drive Day Holiday assign the Holiday Category created above “Half Day Second Half (Half Day (SH))”

 

 

Similarly, to apply half day variant to other Work schedule, create Work Schedule Day model with Variant for Partial Holidays and assign the same Day Model Variant identifier and the Holiday category for the Half Day will follow the variant. For example, let’s say the working Variant for Afternoon Shift is from 06:00 pm to 10:00 pm on a half day holiday then create:

  1. Work Schedule Day model with Day Model usage as Variant for Partial Holiday having the start time and end time as 06:00 pm to 10:00 pm as the scheduled working time.
  2. Assign this Variant Work schedule day Model and the Day Model Variant Identifier to the parent Work schedule Regular Day Model

entry.title: VMD_EI_API
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I created a Vendor API using Class VMD_EI_API=>MAINTAIN. And i passed i required fields to create the Vendor.

At last i can able to create the vendor successfully. But i'm unable to get the vendor in the program.

How to get the vendor number after gets created using  Class VMD_EI_API=>MAINTAIN.

 

Regards

Hari Prasath

entry.title: Re: VMD_EI_API
entry.content:
Use vmd_ei_api=>get_number  to get the vendor number and pass along with request.

Thanks,

Aravind

entry.title: How to default list picker value in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to make list picker value as a default value from the available value in the list picker. The list picker is bind with entity set - Movement type, there is four value available for example 201,202,203,204. I am trying to make 202 as default selected value in list picker.

Could you please help me on this how can I achieve this.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning with SAP SuccessFactors (HXM): Step by Step Illustrations of the Be
entry.content:
thank you for the informative blog @Manivannan .

I have few questions on the same topic : If we need position data , user data , hr and manager position details etc all fo this in a planning model ( planning based on Position ) how can we design and import a data in that case ?

Example i get position details in position dimensions and have a query to get position details only . I cannot get data for HR and Manager position and user data in the same Query so need to make different queries to the entities and try to import ? I tried to do the same but it gave me map to facts errors. What is the best way to handle this situation ?

entry.title: SAP Gateway ignored the filter pass by OData receiver adapter in Integration Sute
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am trying to implement an OData API in Integration Suite and having issues passing the filter to the backend S/4HANA system. This is an end-to-end OData service (Receiver and sender). The requirement is to publish an OData endpoint to expose an OData service built in S/4 HANA using Integration Suite.

Details are :

  1. S/4 HANA development environment has two clients 400 and 411. Cloud connector has access only to client 411. OData service was developed consuming a CDS view using Eclipse in client 400 and copied to 411.

Processing mode = Routing Based and added system alias

2. I tested the OData service with the following URL internally and it is giving the expected result.

https://<hostname>/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZAPI_O2_SALESORDERETA/SalesOrderETA/?$filter=(SoldToParty%20eq%20%2747474%27%20and%20OpenReqdDelivQtyInBaseUnit%20gt%200)

3. iFlow has been configured with the following information.

         a.Runtime configuration - Allowed Header(s) : CamelHttpQuery

          b. OData sender – System generated values.

        c. Odata sender -Script

I tried with following two options.

if(uriInfo.getFilter() != null){

        def filter = uriInfo.getFilter();

        if(odataURI.size()!=0)

        odataURI.append(urlDelimiter);

        odataURI.append("\$filter=").append(filter);

          log.logErrors(LogMessage.TechnicalError,  "Filter value:"+filterExpression);

         }

message.setHeader("odataEntity",entityName);

message.setHeader("odataURI",odataURI.toString());

When I do this, trace has following value for the filter.

odataURI                 : $filter=org.apache.olingo.odata2.core.uri.expression.FilterExpressionImpl@7d1f5f10

Then I tried with this

if(uriInfo.getFilter() != null){

             def filterExpression = uriInfo.getFilter().getExpressionString()

             odataURI.append(urlDelimiter);

        odataURI.append("\$filter=").append(filter);

         odataURI.append("\$filter=").append(filterExpression);

}

message.setHeader("odataEntity",entityName);

message.setHeader("odataURI",odataURI.toString());

Trace had the following value for the filter.

odataURI                 : $filter=(SoldToParty eq '47474' and OpenReqdDelivQtyInBaseUnit gt 0)

        d. OData receiver configuration looks like this.

Connection Address http://<hostname>:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZAPI_O2_SALESORDERETA

Proxy On-Premise

Authentication Basic

Credential Name – Populated with valid credential ID

Processing

Operation details : Query(GET)

Resource Path : SalesETA

HEADER DETAILS – Request Header = *

METADATA DETAILS – Customer query parameter = sap-client=411

The external endpoint is 

https://<hostname>.hana.ondemand.com/gw/odata/SAP/S4_SALESORDERETA;v=1/SalesOrderETATypeSet/?$filter=(SoldToParty eq '47474' and OpenReqdDelivQtyInBaseUnit gt 0)

Message log sys com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Unauthorized : 401 : HTTP/1.1

It would be great if someone could help me.

Kind Regards

Shantha

entry.title: Re: Degraded native app performance on iOS
entry.content:
Causes for some bugs I've discovered so far

  • Setting text to a boolean variable now causes the text to change colour and size
  • When the keyboard is is view, an empty space above the keyboard is created additionally blocking content on the page

entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda 

Is it me or do the managed tags simply not work? 

If I click the "SAP Community" managed tag, I expect to be taken to a page that provides an overview of content with this tag. it could be blogs, Q&A, both mixed together, whatever, but it would be content with this tag. 

What happens is that I seem to get every single post in existence? I get the exact same content if I click on any of the other tags. 

See screenshots below comparing SAP Community tag with SAP Analytics Cloud tag. it is the same content that is displayed. Most of the content has neither tag. 

What the tags do enable though is that I can do a specific search for the text of the tag, and I will get posts that have that tag (as well as posts where the search term is just used somewhere).

But I would think this isn't the only intended usage of the tags?

entry.title: Re: 30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects: Starts on April 1st
entry.content:
Enterprise Architecture will also get a lot of importance with the acquisition of LeanIX into the SAP family. The Enterprise Architecture forum  in Feb and we have see a huge demand from the communuty . Infrastructure Architectures will move into the EA space (as RISE will force them to think otherwise) and their deep skill with help us shape the EA journey.

The 30 days of Learning will be amazing and I am looking forward to learning (as I could not attend all the sessions I wanted in PHL).

Publishing the conference lectures will sent a new trend on how we share and grow the community.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors People Central Hub: All You Need to Know
entry.content:
Hello @lukemarson,

We already have our SF platform live, namely EC for a few years, and I am currently updating our different Config WBs (Transactions, EE Data, FO, Pos Mgmt & Time Off), which are divided on different Excel files.

When prior asking our SF partner to send us SAP most recent versions of the WBs, we got the "People_Central_Hub_Configuration_Worbook". After going through it, it seems to be a merge of all other WBs in one single file.

Therefore, I was wondering if instead of mantaining the info on separate files, we could have it all on that People Central Hub Config WB.

Let me know your thoughts on this.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

entry.title: Insights from the Pregame Show for the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024
entry.content:
We kicked off the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum with a "Pregame Show" to get the virtual audience warmed up. I am pleased to share this with you to get into the experience as we get set for our "30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects".

In this kick-off session for the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024, Shaun Syvertsen  and I deliver a Pregame Show that underscores the profound impact of community, continuous learning, and innovation within the realm of enterprise architecture.

Through dialogue, we explore the pivotal role of enterprise architects in navigating the ever-evolving technological landscape, emphasizing the importance of human skills, networking, and global collaboration. This talk not only serves as a primer for the forum's proceedings but also as a call for enterprise architecture professionals to actively participate and leverage their collective expertise for driving transformative change.

 Main Recommendations

  • Embrace Community and Networking: Attendees are encouraged to actively engage with the community of enterprise architects by learning, sharing, and connecting with peers. The value of building relationships through in-person interactions at the forum and receptions is highlighted as essential for professional growth and networking.

 

  • Participate Actively for Professional Development: The importance of coming to the event with questions and a willingness to learn is emphasized. Attendees are advised to show up with intent and lean in to get the most out of the sessions and interactions, suggesting that those who share their experiences and questions will benefit greatly from the shared knowledge within the community.

 

  • Expand Horizons Globally: The speakers suggest looking forward to the forum's expansion to other countries and its potential to reach a wider audience. This indicates a recommendation for the audience to think globally about the enterprise architecture community and the impact of their work.

 

  • Focus on Continuous Learning and Adaptation: Given the fast pace of technological change, the speakers stress the need for continuous learning, especially in areas like AI, enterprise architecture practices, and SAP’s RISE program. We recommend staying updated and adaptable to new technologies and methodologies.

 

  • Develop Soft Skills: A significant emphasis is placed on the importance of developing human skills such as storytelling and emotional intelligence. Attendees are encouraged to attend sessions focused on these areas, recognizing that technical prowess alone is not enough for success.

 

  • Create Value and Drive Change: The audience is prompted to think about how they can apply what they've learned to create more value and drive change within their organizations. This reflects a broader aim of not just acquiring knowledge but also implementing it effectively.

 

  • Embrace the Role of Enterprise Architects as Change Agents: The forum discussions suggest that enterprise architects should see themselves as key players in guiding their organizations through technological transformations, recommending a proactive approach to problem-solving and innovation.

 

  • Utilize the Community for Support and Learning: The idea of the forum acting as a start of a learning cohort, where attendees can continue to engage, share, and learn from each other even after the event, suggests a recommendation to leverage the community for ongoing support and development.

 

  • Prioritize Inclusivity and Open Sharing: Attendees are encouraged to create an inclusive environment where open, transparent sharing is valued. This approach is recommended to foster a learning community where diverse thoughts and experiences are welcomed.

 

  • Engage with Content and Speakers Online: For those unable to attend in person, the recommendation is to engage with the event’s content and speakers online, indicating the importance of accessing available resources and participating remotely to benefit from the forum.

Checkout our YouTube Recording and enjoy our Preshow Recording!

https://youtu.be/toguRV4ibUk

entry.title: Splitting Total Cost Recognized Values from RA at the time of Settlement
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a custom requirement to achieve the below:

There are 5 different heads or Cost Categories for Project Planning and Actuals

1. Labour

2. Material

3. Subcontracting

4. Other Direct Costs

5. Production Overhead

Here RA method is based on Progress Analysis of the Project and so POC is being retrieved from Project Builder and successive Progress Analysis CNE1

The requirement is after the costs are recognized based on POCX Planned Costs the Accrual/Deferral Costs are to be posted to only the below 3 cost components. 

1. Material

2. Subcontracting

3. Other Direct Costs 

and not to all of them based on a percentage split which will be derived for each one of the above separately. e.g. Percentage of Material 50%, Percentage of Subcon 30% and Percentage of Other Direct Cost 20%

In OKG8 Posting rules config there are line items to post to each of these Accrual/Deferral Accounts i.e. Material Accrual/Deferral Accounts, Subcon etc. based on the technical RA cost elements. 

 

Here there is no CO-PA so during settlement the postings to the P&L and B/S accounts should be picked up from the OKG8 settings.

My question is how do we achieve this in custom? Will it work through the RA user exit KKAG0005 (Relevant for Posting Rules) or will it have to enhanced at through user exits relevant for Settlement CJ88.

Regards,

Suman Misra

entry.content: is any possibility to link to work orders in-order to help /reminder the scheduler to schedule them together?

I'm keen on delving deeper into SAP systems as I believe it will enrich my understanding and make me more competitive in my future job endeavors. I eagerly look forward to being considered for this digital skills initiative!

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content:
Go to SE15 tcode
Choose ABAP Dictionary
Navigate to the 'Fields' folder
Select 'Table Fields'
You can then input the desired field name

entry.content:
Hello David & SAP DSI Team,

I have recently come across @David_Chaviano 's blog post regarding Digital Skills Initiative and I am writing to express my interest in a free certificate attempt.

I am a young woman with more than one year of experience as an SAP ABAP developer and the world of SAP really intrigues me. I have completed many of the learning journeys in SAP Learning and could say that they are really helpful and on point (Kudos!). My focus now is heading towards ABAP Cloud world and I believe this certificate would be a great opportunity for me to evolve and prove my efforts.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards!

entry.title: Very useful blog....Thanks for sharing
entry.content: Very useful blog....Thanks for sharing

entry.title: Re: GRC IAG Bridge: SF RepSync does not show role importe...
entry.content:
Hello,

GRACRLCONN table gets updated via sync job however role needs to be imported to be available in GRACROLE table. Also if you notice AC_REF_ROLE_ID field in GRACRLCONN table will be blank, it will be updated once role is imported. 

Since role is already there in GRACRLCONN, role will be available for provisioning after the import.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Prana

entry.title: Re: Unable to Assign Firefighter ID to Firefighter Owner ID
entry.content:
Hi,

There will be a firefighter role maintained in config parameter 4010. Please assign the same to the user in backend system. Run the repository sync job to sync this access back to GRC. This should help to fix this issue.

Regards,

Prana

entry.title: SAP Successfactors with SAP BUILD APP :Quick Vacant Positions Check App
entry.content:
Positions are one of the most created/modified objects within SAP Successfactors suite  .Hence there is  a need of governing the positions and ensuring that redundant positions are not created. Its quite a tedious task  within  Successfactors(SF)  to check if vacant positions exists  and then proceed with creation of new position if vacant positions doesn't exist.

I was trying to check various options to develop a small app which  helps the  HR Admins to check availability of a vacant position before creation of new position.

Developing a full blown Fiori application as an extension in SAP BTP  was always an option but then I wanted to check if there was something simple and can be implemented  quickly without writing a lot of code.

This is where I decided to take SAP BUILD APP for a ride  and the end result was awesome. I was able to come up with a   working  demo version of the  usecase  in no time and  most importantly without writing any single piece of code.  

A final snapshot of the App (mobile version)developed in SAP BUILD APP :

 

A recording of the demo is available below

 

I would like to share my experience and also my observations on how SAP BUILD APP made Successfactors extensions development  a lot easier.

Pre-Requisites

SAP Developer Tutorials is the best place to start knowing  the basics of SAP BUILD APP and  to get it activated within the SAP BTP trial environment.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-trial-booster.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.appgyver-low-code.html

 

Successfactors Connectivity and Criterias

Before launching the SAP BUILD APP,  I created a destination in the trial subaccount to connect  to one of my sandbox  SF tenants.

 

I identified the criteria based on which i wanted to find only the vacant managerial positions in Successfactors.  The criteria were the below fields

  • country (we had a custom field configured in position to capture the country )

  • cost center

In the real  scenario, we can have more criterias like Org units, company,etc., and as this was a demo --I  took only 2 fields as criteria.

SAP BUILD APP Config

1. Launch SAP BUILD APP from Instance and Subscriptions section in the trial subaccount

2.Create a project of type --SAP Build Apps -->Web &Mobile Application

 

 

3.Click on the newly created project

 

4.Navigate to Auth and Data Tab and Integrate it with SAP systems 

In our scenario we would integrate SAP BUILD APP with the destination that we created in the SAP BTP environment

First navigate to AUTH tab and enable BTP authentication

Navigate to Data tab and connect to BTP destination

5.Enable Position Data entities

6.Navigate back to UI Canvas tab and start designing your web page

Drag and drop the fields from the left panel into the app . For my app I designed as below

  • Header --

     

  • Text(Subtitle)--

     

  • A Card -- to provide a count of all vacant managerial positions

     

  • Input Fields for the criterias and a Submit button to trigger searching of the vacant managerial positions

     

  • A List object to display  the vacant position as    

     

  • Basic Table with data adapter to list all the vacant managerial positions when page is loaded.This component has to be installed from the marketplace 

     

7.Define Data Variables

I defined 2 data variables

  • Position1 -- this is linked to the BASIC TABLE component  and will contain all the managerial vacant positions
  • Position2 -- This would be linked to the managerial vacant position as per the criterias defined and would be loaded when the button 'Get Vacant Position...' is clicked

Both the variable is marked as type 'Collection of data records' as we would be querying multiple records from the position entity

8.Define Page Variables

 

The following page variables were defined

  • paramCostCenter --- This is binded to the Cost Center Input field

     

  • paramCountry-- this is binded to Country Input field

     

  • posCount --This is binded to the Card component and contains the total count of vacant positions

     

  • showVacRes -- This is binded to the visibility attribute of the container where the result of the vacant positions as per the criteria are displayed

9.On Load of Page ,load all the positions into the Basic Data Tab and  populate the count of the positions in the card.

a.Select  the Page in the UI canvas and then click on Add logic on Home Page

b.After the Page Mounted event, add 'Get Record Collection' logic and assign the Position entity as the resource.  Click on the Filter condition and provide the condition as per the screenshot below.

This logic triggers  a Query request to Position entity of SF via the BTP destination and the filter condition is also set accordingly.

c.Populate the data variable -Position1

The values from the previous step is then passed on to this logic wherein Position1 is updated   and as per the binding provided the value to Basic Table component

For the Record Collecton attribute ,  the binding type has to be set to 'Output  value of another node' and then the output of the previous node has to be selected accordingly.

d. Populate the Page variable 'posCount'

The total count of the entries within data variable Position1 is updated again the page variable 'posCount'. This is binded to the CARD component wherein the total count is displayed.

The Assigned value attribute is populated with the respective formula

10.On Click of the button--filter the position data as per the criterias mentioned and load the resulting position in the list screen.

a. Navigate to Show logic of the Button(Get Vacancy).

 

b. Add  Get Record Collection logic  and link it to Component Tap event. This logic will again trigger a query to the position entity of SF tenant via the BTP destination.

The Filter condition has to  include the page variables -paramCountry and paramCostCenter

 

c. Set the data variable Position2 to the result of the 'Get Record Collection' logic

The filter values from the Position entity are passed on the Position2 which is binded to list item wherein the results are displayed.

 

d. The other Pagevariables are related to the display of the repsective components and are binded to the visibility attribute of the component.

11. Launch and test the application

 

For preview on your mobile --you can install SAP BUILD APPS in your mobile , generate a PIN and then preview the same in your mobile

Conclusion and Observations

SAP BUILD offers a no code option to seamlessly connect to Successfactors Position entity and design the screen just by drag and drop.

SAP BUILD APP also provides a lot of options on the mobile preview  wherein it can interact with your device and perform actions like open your device camera, open contacts, interact with you device barometer,gyroscope ,etc.

One important observation was that the SAP BUILD APP doesn't provide a UPSERT action . It only provides CREATE, REPLACE, UPDATE and DELETE action when making a call to external data. When updates are done in Successfactors, UPSERT actions are predominantly used and with the existing SAP BUILD APP actions, it is very difficult to update entries in Successfactors.  For example, I started developing an app for Quick Hire of employee and in this case EmpEmployment had to be updated .This can be performed only by UPSERT action as Empemployment doesn't have Creatable enabled at the schema level.

I believe providing an UPSERT action will be part of the SAP BUILD Roadmap and once available ,it would be very easy to design Self service applications and deploy then as Successfactors extensions   with low code/no code  options.

Future development of Sucessfactors extensions with SAP BUILD looks exciting and awesome.

Looking forward to your comments   and observations.

entry.title: Kicking Off Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum: A Journey of Growth and Community
entry.content:
During my kickoff I welcomed attendees to our landmark Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024. From acknowledging the remarkable turnout both in-person and online, thanking our dedicated sponsors, to sharing insights into the event's evolution and its pivotal role in the enterprise architecture community, this opening talk set the stage for a conference that was brimming with learning opportunities, innovation, and collaboration.

I discussed sessions that promised to shape our future understanding and application of SAP solutions. We are on this journey to explore, learn, and connect with peers and experts alike in the fascinating world of enterprise architecture especially in the age of AI.

 

Major Takeaways According to AI:

Community and Collaboration:

Paul emphasizes the importance of the community, thanking sponsors, supporters, volunteers, and attendees for their roles in bringing the event to life. He reflects on the growth of the Enterprise Architecture event from its inception four years ago, indicating a strong community spirit and collaborative effort. He mentions the significance of learning together and working together to help each other, suggesting future virtual activities, meetups, and collaborations to strengthen the community further.

Innovation and Growth: The talk showcases the evolution of the event and the Enterprise Architecture community over the years. Paul shares his journey of hosting a 19-city road show and how it led to the realization of the need for recurring events. This reflects a commitment to continuous improvement, innovation, and expansion of the community's reach and impact.

Educational and Knowledge Sharing: The forum is positioned as a space for sharing knowledge, networking, and shaping the future together. With a range of sessions, including deep dives into specific subjects and discussions on enterprise architecture, AI, and other cutting-edge topics, the event aims to enrich participants' understanding and skills. Paul's mention of the 'day zero' session and its positive feedback underscores the educational value of the forum.

Engagement and Interaction: The organization of the event with conversation corners, crowd-sourced trip reports, and a flag photo contest indicates a focus on engaging attendees actively. These initiatives aim to foster interactions among participants, enabling them to share experiences, learn from one another, and contribute to the collective wisdom of the community.

Future Orientation and Strategic Planning: The emphasis on enterprise architecture as a key to unlocking the value of solutions and setting up for future innovation, as highlighted in Thomas's video message, points to a future-oriented mindset. Paul's mention of the community's plans for future activities and the desire to replicate the event's success globally illustrates strategic planning for the community's growth and impact.

Accessibility and Inclusivity: Paul highlights the efforts to make the event accessible to a wider audience through live streaming and the significant online registration turnout. This demonstrates a commitment to inclusivity and expanding the community's reach beyond physical attendance.

What to Watch:

Check out this short YouTube video clip introducing our forum and also hear a very special welcome from SAP Board Member Thomas Saueressig where he talks about the importance of our Enterprise Architect SAP Community.

https://youtu.be/94KTkJGGY6E?feature=shared

Nugget of Next:

30 Days of EA Learning starts on April 1st with daily SAP Community Enterprise Architecture Group blogs and posts highlighting these that I will do on LinkedIn

CTA: For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and follow Paul Kurchina - http://linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina

 

Agenda - Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architecture Forum February 26-29, 2024

entry.title: Mass printing transaction VF31F disabled
entry.content:
Dear all,

At the client I am working with, there is a user who was using the VF31F transaction to do mass printing and after the SAP S/4Hana version update, the transaction was disabled by SAP.

Has anyone experienced the same situation? If so, what alternative solution did they apply so that the users could continue to print massively?

In my user's case, he executed transaction VF31F and the transaction already downloaded the invoice document in PDF format to a local folder on his computer.

entry.title: How can I create a column with "Direct Links" to classes in Plateau Report Designer?
entry.content:
Hi all, I want to create a report in Plateau Report Designer; a direct link to a class. I know the logic to build a direct link. I can identify the class id and I know the strings, which I have to add before and after the class id.

This even works in the preview in PRD, but the report fails in Success Learning. Since the concat function basically works, I assume that the strings before and after the class id create the problems. Maybe it is the special characters inside, maybe they are too long.

Do you have a workaround for that? How can I create a PRD with direct links to classes?

Thanks a lot, Uwe

entry.title: Re: Create an Application with SAP Build Apps
entry.content: it was very informative and easy to understand thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management service generally available
entry.content:
Is there plan to have configuration center bundle in Successfactors being transported by CTMS ?

these would completely transform the  way configuration is moved on successfactors landscape
